name: BlogCard
title: 描述卡片
description: 图文博客展示卡片，支持自定义图片、标题、正文与操作按钮，可绑定按钮点击事件
author: LiuHan

properties.name: imgSrc
properties.description: 卡片顶部图片资源地址
properties.label: 图片地址

properties.name: text
properties.label: 卡片正文
properties.defaultValue: Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card's content.

properties.name: btnText
properties.description: 底部操作按钮显示文字
properties.label: 按钮文字

events.name: onBtnClick
events.description: 点击底部操作按钮时触发，会自动阻止a标签默认跳转行为
events.label: 按钮点击
